feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Modify the material quantity or price in a posted purchase order
entry.content:
In the SAP MM module, after a purchase order has been posted, how can I modify the material quantity or price in the already posted purchase order?

I am currently learning the MM (Material Management) module in SAP ERP, specifically the procurement process. I have already understood the basic process of creating purchase orders. Today, while posting a purchase order, I was wondering how to modify an already posted purchase order if there is an error in its content. I am using SAP Logon 750. I have read the relevant training materials and official documentation, but I am still unclear on some details. I would appreciate some specific guidance or best practice recommendations. Any related screenshots or step-by-step instructions would be greatly appreciated. Thank you for your help。

entry.title: Consignment Settlement Report consider Batch Price
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can you please let me know how consignment settlement report consider the price.

There is active Info Record and Batch price is also maintained. Consignment settlement report consider the batch price.
What changes we need to do if we need the PIR price in settlement report?

entry.title: What kind of knowledge should a beginner need to prepare in order to use SAP effectively?
entry.content: Hello everyone, I am a beginner in SAP and would like to ask what is the minimum knowledge required for someone without a background in management or related accounting fields to use SAP effectively?

entry.title: The purchase order cannot be saved in the SAP MM module
entry.content: The purchase order cannot be saved in the SAP MM module, prompting "Account assignment category is missing"

entry.title: Xblnr_alt update via function module or IRBM no field for malaysia
entry.content:
Hello Members,

Would you please let us know the functional module to update the XBLNR_ALT field to update the IRBM number for Malaysia.

We are not using  the solution provided by SAP for Malaysia e-invoicing.
We are trying to use XBLNR_ALT field to update the IRBM number via FM. If there is any other field we can use to store the IRBM number in the FI document number, please let us know.

thanks in advance

entry.title: 如何在SAP中查看物料的库存数量？
entry.content:
大家好，
我在SAP系统中需要查看某个物料的当前库存数量，请问可以使用哪些事务代码来查询？
谢谢大家的帮助！

entry.title: After VL31N, Inbound delivery shows no document
Syntax Error Include not found
entry.content:
Good morning
I have errors in some SAP transactions.
For example...

INCLUDE "IF_SALV_EVENTS_FUNCTIONS=====IU" does not exist.

Someone knows what may be happening

Thank you

entry.title: Staffing Resources with No availability
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In the Staffing Overview app, I am attempting to assign a resource to a task, but when I perform a search, it displays all the resources, including those who have no availability. Additionally, I am able to assign a resource even if their availability is  0, which leads to potential scheduling conflicts.

Is there a way or a setting that can block the assignment of resources with zero availability? Is there way to make the system throw an error or warning message?

Regards,

Gunadharshini

entry.title: Moving from Obsolete transaction V_V1 to V_V2
entry.content: We are currently with ECC version and for confirming the unconfirmed orders, we have been using background jobs scheduled with obsolete transaction V_V1. Now business has decided to start using V_V2 based on the sorting criteria via background jobs. From past experience, please let me what important points should be considered during the transition from V_V1 to V_V2 and what issues we should anticipate during this transition. Regards

entry.title: Payment term description
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Payment terms description is showing in german language in tax invoice print however in billing document header its showing in english. 

i have checked table tvzbt in that table payment terms in maintained in both languages german and english. 

Also i not able to see the print preview of the billing document.

entry.title: When the new SAP Note for RFHUDSP will be available (containing new legal requirement)?
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please kindly advise when the new SAP Note for RFHUDSP will be available (containing new legal requirement)? 

Thank you,

Bozena

entry.title: Display samples pulled per material
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm doing a project where I'm reducing the number of samples pulled of a certain type.

I'm wondering if there's a T-Code I can use to pull a report for each sample pulled for a material. I've been trying QA02 but that's specific to an Inspection Lot which is already released and I'm hoping to get the samples required for a material regardless of an Inspection Lot released (i.e. to display samples which aren't SAP orders etc).

I don'd mind having to manually go through each material if that's required, but if there's a way to pull in mass it would be great as I'll have about 700 to go through.

Thanks in advance,

David

entry.title: The support report for the asset process with the AFAB transaction is incomplete when we process mor
entry.content:
Hi everybody, I am new user of this community and I have a question for you... I hope you can help us with this.

We are processing the amortization of machinery assets, there are more than 1000, therefore, we run the process in background mode and the system does not give us the complete final report. There are more than 1400 assets and only a little more than 700 appear in the previus report.

Is there any way to make the previous report show more than 1000 assets?

entry.title: How to link a Storage bin / Material with a Storage Location
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to link a dedicated a [Storage type 4 / Storage Section / Storage Bin 4] with the Storage location 2 (see below).

The idea is that when I will transfer a material in the Storage Bin 4, it will only be link with the Storage Location 2.

For your information, the Storage Location 2 has a specific setup (Storage location stock excluded from MRP) that should only apply to the [Storage type 4 / Storage Section / Storage Bin 4].

I have seen in several posts that there is no link between a Storage Location and a Storage Type / Bin so my question is :

How can I set up so that the item code that goes into Storage Bin 4 is only linked to Storage Location 2 ?

entry.title: Automatic transfer of an asset when changing Cost Center
entry.content: When I change a cost center (resulting in Profit Center change) system generates automatic transfer document. I know this is generate by the Time independent setting for the company code. My question is - how system determines the transaction types to be used for that transfer? (SAP ECC 6.0)

entry.title: Oracle create inventory issue
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are installing SAP ECC6 EHP5 with oracle 11g(11203).

We proceeds with ./RUNINSTALLER after that it prompts for oracle installer and when we have executed "create inventory" step using OUI, the OUI gets hang in "Create Inventory directory  but not asking for next step "prerequisite checks".

We are stuck here from last one month but its hang in processing stage of "create inventory".

entry.title: How can I deactivate the deletion of PIRs me that have already been served?
entry.content:
We are in the pre-planning environment (PIR).
How can I deactivate the deletion of pre-planned requirements that have already been served (i.e. where a withdrawal quantity exceeds the planned quantity, see MD73)?

This is relevant because I have a rolling plan that, among other things, is handed over again.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: ME21N Document overview within the Selection variant
entry.content: I create PO's under ME21N and have created several variants and would like them to appear in the drop-down under the document overview when I click on the selection variant icon. How can I add to that drop-down list so that my variants appear.

entry.title: Creation of condition records not possible in Scheduling Agreement
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus,

When I'm trying to create conditions for new velidity period for existing SA, update gets canceled. When change is made in ME32L with new validity period (01.01.2025-31.12.2025 with reference to previous one 01.01.2024-31.12.2024) I get info that change was saved. However changes are not visable at all and after a moment I get notification that update was canceled:

Doc type is YIC. It seems that I have a deadlock on some processes:

Do you have any idea on how to handle that case so these new prices can be updated?

Many thanks!
